description: Typing in the REPL only accepts one character. After that, any additional characters typed are ignored.
regression_tests: terminal_client/test/widget_test_ui.dart::wires terminal text input changes/submission to key events
root_cause: Same session as book bugs (8bc7605b, 023840af). Two compounding issues: (1) client onSubmitted cleared TextEditingController before resetting _terminalInputShadow, causing _handleTerminalInputChanged to detect a deletion and send a spurious backspace to the PTY on Flutter Web — corrupting the line buffer after every submit; (2) server readTerminalOutput called AppendOutput after ReadAvailable had already appended, doubling PTY output in live.output.
notes: Filed ~90 seconds after the two book reports from the same device (flutter-1776601915162), describing the same broken state.
